judgment.summary: DoorDash shows strong revenue growth and healthy free cash flow, but faces valuation concerns and declining earnings.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported quarter (March 31, 2026) EPS of $0.42 beat estimates of $0.36 by 15.4%. Next earnings date is May 6, 2026.
positives: Free cash flow was strong at $2.30B TTM.
Gross margin of 51.8% indicates good pricing power.
The forward P/E of 19.87x is significantly lower than the trailing P/E of 73.29x, suggesting future earnings growth is expected.
Analysts have a strong consensus 'buy' rating with a mean target price of $245.99.
negatives: Earnings growth was negative at -6.1% year-over-year.
Quarterly earnings growth was also negative at -4.7%.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter are negative at -13.0%.
The PEG ratio of 3.32x suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to its expected earnings growth.
High beta of 1.87 indicates higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: DoorDash (DASH) is currently trading around $154.65, with recent news highlighting Wolfe Research naming it a top pick and StockStory reporting its stock is up. While other headlines discuss unrelated market movements and events, the positive analyst rating and upward stock trend suggest a potentially favorable outlook for the company.
